restaurant:hours: We're open Tuesday through Sunday, 11 am to 10 pm. Closed Mondays for prep.
restaurant:reservations: You can book a table by calling us directly or through our website. Walk-ins are always welcome at the bar.
restaurant:menu: Our menu changes with the seasons. Today's specials are posted on the chalkboard and on our site.
restaurant:dietary: We accommodate gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegetarian diets. Just let your server know.
restaurant:parking: Street parking is available on Main and 3rd. There's also a public lot two blocks north.
dental:insurance: We accept most major PPO plans. Call the front desk and we'll verify your benefits before your visit.
dental:emergency: If you're in pain, call us directly. We reserve same-day slots for urgent cases.
dental:first-visit: Your first visit includes a comprehensive exam, digital X-rays, and a cleaning. Plan for about 90 minutes.
dental:whitening: We offer in-office whitening and custom take-home trays. Results typically last one to two years.
dental:kids: We welcome patients of all ages. Our team is gentle with little ones and we have a play area in the lobby.
retail:returns: Returns are accepted within 30 days with a receipt. Sale items are final.
retail:shipping: We ship within two business days. Local delivery is free on orders over fifty dollars.
retail:sizing: Our size guide is on every product page. Unsure? Message us and we'll help you find the right fit.
retail:loyalty: Join our loyalty program in-store or online. Earn a point per dollar and redeem at five hundred points.
retail:gift-cards: Gift cards are available in any amount and never expire. Digital or physical.
salon:booking: Book online or text us. We recommend scheduling cuts two weeks out and color four weeks out.
salon:products: We carry the full line we use in-house. If we don't have it, we can special-order it for you.
salon:cancellations: Please give us 24 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
salon:walk-ins: We take walk-ins when we have openings. Call ahead to check availability.
salon:extensions: We offer tape-in and hand-tied extensions. Consultations are complimentary.
gym:membership: Monthly memberships start at forty-nine dollars. No annual contracts, cancel anytime with 30 days notice.
gym:classes: Classes are included with membership. Reserve your spot through the member portal.
gym:hours: We're open 5 am to 10 pm weekdays, 7 am to 8 pm weekends.
gym:personal-training: Personal training packages start at three sessions. Your first assessment is complimentary.
gym:guest: Members can bring one guest per month. Additional guest passes are ten dollars each.
